title: Sneak Nether Portals
body:
This is a simple mod adding some QoL upgrades to Nether Portals.

 
**Features:**
* Sneak to use Nether Portals; no accidental entering portals, even on creative mode;
* Instant use! After pressing shift, you'll instantly travel to the other side of the portal.


**Warning:** This mod will not work on vanilla servers. To use this mod on servers, the server must have the mod installed.
